mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM students) AS totalStudents, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM students WHERE status = '재학') AS activeStudents, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM students WHERE status = '휴학') AS inactiveStudents, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subjects) AS totalSubjects, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT department) FROM students) AS totalDepartments

SELECT d.department, COALESCE(st.student_count, 0) AS studentCount, COALESCE(st.active_count, 0) AS activeCount, COALESCE(st.student_count, 0) - COALESCE(st.active_count, 0) AS inactiveCount, COALESCE(sub.subject_count, 0) AS subjectCount FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT department FROM students UNION SELECT DISTINCT department FROM subjects ) d LEFT JOIN ( SELECT department, COUNT(*) AS student_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '재학' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS active_count FROM students GROUP BY department ) st ON d.department = st.department LEFT JOIN ( SELECT department, COUNT(*) AS subject_count FROM subjects GROUP BY department ) sub ON d.department = sub.department ORDER BY studentCount DESC

SELECT sub.id, sub.subject, sub.department, sub.professor, COUNT(sg.student_id) AS gradedCount, ROUND(AVG( COALESCE(sg.attendance_score, 0) * COALESCE(w.attendance_weight, 10) / 100 + COALESCE(sg.midterm_score, 0) * COALESCE(w.midterm_weight, 30) / 100 + COALESCE(sg.final_score, 0) * COALESCE(w.final_weight, 40) / 100 + COALESCE(sg.assignment_score, 0) * COALESCE(w.assignment_weight, 20) / 100 ), 1) AS avgScore, ROUND(MAX( COALESCE(sg.attendance_score, 0) * COALESCE(w.attendance_weight, 10) / 100 + COALESCE(sg.midterm_score, 0) * COALESCE(w.midterm_weight, 30) / 100 + COALESCE(sg.final_score, 0) * COALESCE(w.final_weight, 40) / 100 + COALESCE(sg.assignment_score, 0) * COALESCE(w.assignment_weight, 20) / 100 ), 1) AS maxScore, ROUND(MIN( COALESCE(sg.attendance_score, 0) * COALESCE(w.attendance_weight, 10) / 100 + COALESCE(sg.midterm_score, 0) * COALESCE(w.midterm_weight, 30) / 100 + COALESCE(sg.final_score, 0) * COALESCE(w.final_weight, 40) / 100 + COALESCE(sg.assignment_score, 0) * COALESCE(w.assignment_weight, 20) / 100 ), 1) AS minScore FROM subjects sub LEFT JOIN subject_grade_weights w ON w.subject_id = sub.id LEFT JOIN subject_grades sg ON sg.subject_id = sub.id GROUP BY sub.id, sub.subject, sub.department, sub.professor ORDER BY sub.department, sub.subject

SELECT sub.id, sub.subject, sub.department, sub.professor, COUNT(DISTINCT st.id) AS totalStudents, COUNT(DISTINCT sg.student_id) AS gradedStudents, COUNT(DISTINCT st.id) - COUNT(DISTINCT sg.student_id) AS ungradedStudents FROM subjects sub LEFT JOIN students st ON st.department = sub.department LEFT JOIN subject_grades sg ON sg.subject_id = sub.id GROUP BY sub.id, sub.subject, sub.department, sub.professor ORDER BY ungradedStudents DESC, sub.department
